inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Defines whether the slider is in disabled state.

inputs.name: editableTooltip
inputs.description:
Indicates whether input fields should be used as tooltips for the handles.

*Note:** Setting this option to true will only work if showTooltip is set to true.
*Note:** In order for the component to comply with the accessibility standard, it is recommended to set the editableTooltip property to true.

inputs.name: labelInterval
inputs.description:
Displays a label with a value on every N-th step.

*Note:** The step and tickmarks properties must be enabled.
Example - if the step value is set to 2 and the label interval is also specified to 2 - then every second
tickmark will be labelled, which means every 4th value number.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Defines the maximum value of the slider.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Defines the minimum value of the slider.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
Determines the name by which the component will be identified upon submission in an HTML form.

*Note:** This property is only applicable within the context of an HTML Form element.

inputs.name: showTickmarks
inputs.description:
Enables tickmarks visualization for each step.

*Note:** The step must be a positive number.

inputs.name: showTooltip
inputs.description: Enables handle tooltip displaying the current value.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description:
Defines the size of the slider's selection intervals (e.g. min = 0, max = 10, step = 5 would result in possible selection of the values 0, 5, 10).

*Note:** If set to 0 the slider handle movement is disabled.

outputs.name: ui5Change
outputs.description: Fired when the value changes and the user has finished interacting with the slider.

outputs.name: ui5Input
outputs.description: Fired when the value changes due to user interaction that is not yet finished - during mouse/touch dragging.
